entry.title: Correct usage of SBO_Application.RemoveWindowsMessage
entry.content:
I am trying to optimize reading of a UI grid that has a large number of rows. This grid is a user defined grid on a user defined form used in a UI Addon om Business One V 10 hana.

I have over a 10,000 rows that I need to process however looping through them crashes the entire addon roughly every  100 rows.

Note that there are no updates done to the grid or the data table behind that grid during the loop. Only reading.

It has been suggested that this issue may relate to the issue noted on SAP note  below even though I don't directly get the same error message. SAP note contents are appended below too.

Can someone explain the correct usage of the 2nd solution given in the note please - the usage of

SBO_Application.RemoveWindowsMessage 

 

<< 1506163 - UI_UI API break down with RPC error>>

==================================================

Symptom

Your add-on is running long-time operations, also the UI API keeps sending events to this add-on. After the long-time operation is done, you may get the error:

Exception: System.InvalidCastException: Unable to cast COM object of type 'SAPbouiCOM.ApplicationClass' to interface
type 'SAPbouiCOM.IApplication'. This operation failed because the QueryInterface call on the COM component for the interface with
IID '{D1F75D47-137C-4335-AC2A-3FE209831B6A}' failed due to the following error: System call failed. (Exception from HRESULT: 0x80010100 (RPC_E_SYS_CALL_FAILED)).

Cause

Limitation

Solution

Workaround

Set the key HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Windows\“USERPostMessageLimit” in regedit. Make this key large enough like 400,000

Or you can use the RemoveWindowsMessage method which is exposed in 8.82 like this:

System.Threading.Thread.Sleep(1000 * 60);    //replace with your real working code  
SBO_Application.RemoveWindowsMessage(SAPbouiCOM.BoWindowsMessageType.bo_WM_TIMER, true); 

This method enables you to deal with extreme scenarios. When an add-on needs to take a long time to process a UI API event, it prevents SAP Business One from processing the Windows message queue.

Other terms

RPC Call, Thread, SDK, synchronous, asynchronous

entry.title: Re: Invalid Record Offset
entry.content: Hi there, I’m a new member of SAP community, I tried to import AR invoices linked to Sale order via DTW facing error code invalid record offset (ODBC-2010/65171). Also, i’m using SAP DI API Business one 10.0 with SQL server 2017. I’m looking for relevant post and solutions to solve it but cannot find any help regarding this error. If any expert member see my inquiry here, please give me some solutions. Best regards,

entry.title: (SAP Companion) Edit Mode not working in Learning?
entry.content:
I have configured SAP Enable Now integration with S/4HANA On-Premise for Extended Mode. I am able to create content in the Tour tab

However when I go to the Learning tab and click on the Edit icon, I am not able to go further. There is no + sign to add content.

 

 

 

 

01) What custom content can I create in the Learning tab via the browser directly? 

02) If I can create custom content in the Learning tab, what could be wrong when I click on the Edit icon and no further action is possible.

Regarding Learning Center: Can we add our own content or change the standard content to show up in the Learning Center? Again I can click on the Edit icon but no further activities are possible.

 

 

Thanks and best regards.

entry.title: QM Notification.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In QM notification when I am assigning a task, releasing and completing I am getting 2 notification mail in system. 
My question is why I am getting 2 mail. Is it because when I release the task I got 1 mail and when complete I get another mail or is there any other issue that I am getting 2 mail. since today it is happening?

Thanks a lot 

Regards,

Binni

entry.title: Re: #COE #BA01 Cost Center on Asset Acquisition credit
entry.content:
There’s proposal that details steps are as below.

Example data:

  • Company code: 1310.
  • Supplier account: 1000122, reconciliation account is 21100000.
  • Asset Capitalization Clearing (Expense) GL Account: 61003000.
  • Cost center 13101101
  • Asset master data: 500019-0

Process steps:

  1. Create supplier invoice for Account payable with APP “Create Supplier invoice”, and the result is as below.

2. Create new asset master data.

 

3. Post the asset acquisition via app “Clear outgoing Payment-Manual Clearing”.

 

 

4. Check post asset acquisition value in asset master data.

5. Check the report for GL account “61003000” line items as below.

6. Clear GL account “61003000” if it’s needed.

entry.title: Re: Grpo qty is greater than Po qty in sap b1 hana Validation
entry.content: ok

entry.title: Re: (SAP Companion) Edit Mode not working in Learning?
entry.content:
Hi,

Question 1 - None.  The Learning tab is used to display eLearning content, such as Simulations, Book Pages, and Media Objects, e.g. PDF documents, hosted in Enable Now Manager.  You must create this content using the Manager Web Editor, Producer, or Instant Producer.  You can also record Simulations directly into Manager, using the nice new Simulation recorder

Question 2 - Nothing is wrong, you cannot create content in the Learning tab through SAP Companion.  You can get your own content to appear in the Learning Center.  The following rules must be correct for an object in Manager to appear in the Learning Center:

1. The content object must be int he correct WA in Manager and published
2. The content object must have the same Language as the application interface that you are viewing; although content does also appear for fallback languages if content is not available in your primary language.  By default, the fallback language for SAP Companion is US English
3. The content must have the same Product Name and Product Version as your application, e.g.

When you record Simulations, using Producer, Instant Producer, or the new Manager Simulation recorder, the Product Name and Product Version details are automatically added to the content.  The Context of the screens that have been recorded are also automatically added.

If you want to link non-system content, such as Book Pages to an application screen, you must do that linking manually, or using the recording functionality in Producer.

 Hope that helps.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: No response when clicking close button on fragement in custom action of UI5 Element
entry.content: Hi, UI5 Expert, The previous error in screen shot is coursed by a controller extension. If I comment override the in controller extension, this error will disappear.

entry.title: How we can use SAP MII BLS as an API in Custom UI Plugin in SAP Digital manufacturing?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I am working on a Custom UI plugin which is having some table columns. 

I want to consume SAP MII BLS transaction as an API in Custom UI plugin in SAP Digital Manufacturing.

is there any possibility to consume imported SAP MII BLS transaction in Digital manufacturing custom plugin?

 

Thanks in Advance 

Regards, 
Utkarsh Raj

entry.title: Attach Rate Planning in IBP
entry.content:
Attach rate planning is typically done to find component (or a secondary product's) demand based on header (primary product's) demand. While in some cases, you have a static BOM (Bill of Material) relation between the header and component, there could be Configurable Materials (KMATs) which do not have a static BOM. In those cases, you have to generate a BOM based on historical sales/production data.

Note: Just to clarify, by static BOM here, I mean that the ratio of input to output components is fixed.

Below I am going to describe a specific case for a client that I worked for. This is not the most complicated case and does not cover all aspects of possible requirements around attach rate planning but will give you a flavor of a possible solution around it.

Requirement: To find the gross requirement for components which are secondaries for several type of primary products, such as-

  1. MTS/MTO Items which have a static BOM relation with the components.
  2. Configurable materials which did not have a static BOM (so, for these materials, the BOM would vary from one sales order to another).

Another point to consider was that these configurable materials were not forecasted at individual level, but at an aggregated level. Fictional Materials (called HBOMs) were created to aggregate shipment history from configurable materials (falling withing the same Product Hierarchy and Brand- which were both product attributes) and then forecast/demand was generated at the HBOM level.

Attach Rate Calculation

To calculate attach rates & gross demand for component we needed two things-

  1. Demand for the fictional HBOM Material and that was available from the demand planning module of IBP (demand planning was a straightforward process where the history data for all configurable materials within a HBOM was aggregated and then statistical models were run to generate statistical forecast for the HBOM material).
  2. The BOM relation between HBOM and components: Since, there was no fixed relation between the configurable materials and components, we had to calculate that relation (or the attach rate) somehow as this was not available as Master data in source (ECC).

For the second point, we had to perform the below steps to generate the BOM between the HBOM and the corresponding components:

  • Read all production orders for all the configurable materials which fall under a particular HBOM. Aggregate all good receipts- (say movement type 101, 102) in a month for all configurable materials that were produced (of course UOM conversions have to be accounted for) and thus get the aggregated Production quantity for the HBOM in that month.
  • Get all components issued against those production orders, read the good issue quantity (say movement type 261, 262), and thus for every HBOM, get a consumption history of the components.

  • Apart from getting the Production quantity for HBOM and consumption quantity for corresponding components, we used the above to also create Production Source Header and Production Source Item Master data. Any component which was issued even once to any of the configurable materials under the HBOM gets added to the PSI for the corresponding HBOM. We do not update any static component coefficient in the Production Source Item Master data as that gets updated in a time varying way using attach rates.

  • Current month’s attach rates for every component are then calculated dividing the Sum of consumption history for the last 6 months for the component by Sum of production history for the last 6 months for the HBOM.

  • Once the attach rates are calculated (and finalized), copy it to the standard Component Coefficient Key Figure. Now, we have both: the demand coming for the HBOM (copied to the standard Independent Demand key figure) and the component coefficient created for the BOM items.

  • Run SOP Heuristics (infinite Heuristics) to propagate the demand from the header to the component. If these components are also a part of MTS/MTO (which have a static BOM), that gets aggregated in the Gross demand.

Note: We also considered doing this using Demand Planning module (DP BOM kind of functionality using Attribute transformations), but this approach of using S&OP Heuristics ended up being the simplest in our case.

There are other functionalities that you can use with SOP Heuristics- Validities, substitution etc. which we are using as well however they are easy to understand and use standard functionalities.

Hope this was helpful! Thanks.

entry.title: CVI_BDT_ADAPTER:012 Error on SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hi SAP Guys,

I have successfully implementated a Business Partner (BP) functionality on SAP ECC system.

Here, This functionality converts 'Vendor' & 'Customer' to 'Business Partner' accordingly.

(On SAP ECC system only).

Initially everything was coreect, going smoothly. but later we observed that for vendor master generated 'Business Partner' is not able to display the 'Company code' (FLVN00) as well as 'Purchasing Org.' level data. (FLVN01) We are getting below error message.

E:CVI_BDT_ADAPTER:012
As per error message we have checked all the internal possible soultion to resolve this issue but still we are not able to find the root cause.

Please note, Same functionality is working fine for 'Customer Master'.

Can anybodey help me here to solve this issue.

Thanks in advance for support.

Thanks,

Rohit Kuthiye

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing and SAP MII integration
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,
 
I have few Questions related to SAP Digital Manufacturing and SAP MII integration 
 
Scenario
If any customer has already SAP MII Now they want to move in Digital Manufacturing.
If DM is Connected to MII using Web servers and able to import (in Service registry) BLS Web files in DM.
Customer wants to use the existing BLS/UI of MII in DM.
 
Questions-
1. Can we use SAP MII Existing (BLS and UI) KPI and Reports in DM?
2. We have register some BLS in Service registry in DM can we use that in Embedded SAC? 
3. Data is stored in MII DB and Customer wants to use their old data in DM, how we can access those DB tables?
 
Thanks in Advance !!
 
Regards,
Utkarsh Raj

entry.title: CSRF Token Validation Error
entry.content:
Hello fellow developers,

recently we ran into an issue which we gave us a very hard time.

Scenario

A UI5 application runs in the #SAP Workzone Standard Edition# and uses the SAP Managed Approuter to connect to the workflow runtime servie as well as a backend SAP Gateway destination with principal propagation.
Everything worked fine in regards to the workflow requests as well as the GET requests to the Gateway system. What did not work were any requests that required a valid CSRF Token, like POST or UPDATE. 
The app did sent requests with a valid CSRF token to the backend, but the system refused to accept it. 

The app worked like this: When it is opened with a certain URL, the app loads some information from the workflow runtime and needs a CSRF token for this. The xs-app.json looked like this:

You can see the route for the workflow runtime as well as the SAP Gateway System and its destination. It was set up just like you would expect to find this on any tutorial.

Solution

We had to set the csrfProtection to false for the SAP Gateway destination.

With this settings the csrf token for the ODataModel was then issued by the SAP Gateway.

entry.title: need suggetion for upgrade HANA version
entry.content:
Hi experts,

  We are using S4HANA ON PREMISE SAP S/4HANA 1809 and datebase  2.00.037.07.1595989006 ( fa/hana2sp03 ) , detail can be found in the screenshot. Currently, we are experiencing the issue mentioned in  NOTE 0002940750 - Column Store DML Statements Waiting for DeltaDataObjectAppendRollover Lock. It seems the better solution is to upgrade HANA database version to 2.054.00 (SPS05) or higher. 

  Our concern here is that the current version of HANA has already reached SPS07, with many versions in between. Which version would be the best choice or the most stable option for us this time? Additionally, if we only upgrade the database without upgrading S/4HANA, will there be any compatibility issues? We hope the experts can provide some advice.

  Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Components Wizard install never starts after c...
entry.content:
I ran into the same problem. Some components simply refuse to start the installation on new VM.

Finally solved the problem. It is the same issue we had in the past when setting up the SAP Client, and after install there were no DB server and no company available. 

We run SBO on SQL Server 2017. According to Adminguide on machines running the Client or B1 services, MS ODBC driver 13 is required for MSSQL 2016 and 2017. Even tough that is installed, the client or services or addons don’t work or even will not install at all, because of connection issues. See the windows event log, connection issues, unfortunately without the cause, so you can only guess.

I just can recommend installing „Microsoft SQL Server 2012 Native Client“ - solved the majority of issues with SBO, and once more this driver was key to get that stalling Component Wizard setup working on new VM for WebClient.

Still unclear why that SQL Client is the culprit. We run latest Windows Server OS, Windows 10, all full patched and x64. This issue regularly shows up and I have marked it in handout as first possible solution. 
Maybe this will help other people keep their hair and mind.

entry.title: Application for Digital Skills Initative
entry.content:
Dear SAP team,

I would like to apply for Digital Skills Iniative so I am starting a discussion to show my interest in the program. I just started my SAP career for around 1 year and I really love it. Now I found that if I have a certification, it will be one of my advantages as a women in competitive labor market. In addition, I'm a first-generation college student, leading to strong support from my family to my education and career, so that I have strong aspirations to seize any opportunity to develop myselft and be better.

I would be very lucky if I have opportunity to join in this program. I will trully appreciate that.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Data action is taking long to execute
entry.content:
Hi, I just had a question on how I can make my data action execute faster. 

As you can see my data actions are taking abnormally long and my data action is just a simple copy step and a advanced formula step that simply has a delete attached to it. 

Is there any way to speed up the process and make it run faster?

Thank you! Ammar

entry.title: Change /PLMU/WDC_RFO table column property 'Read-Only' dynamically
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I am stuck with a strange issue in the standard WD /PLMU/WDC_RFO.
The requirement is to enhance the View - V_ITEM_TABLE and change the property of Item and Specification columns to 'read only'.

In the view layout, the UI element of the table column had read-only property binding as 'Bind to the property of the selected attribute'.

In the post-exit of method WDDOMODIFYVIEW, I've used the
CALL METHOD lo_element->set_attribute_property

EXPORTING

attribute_name = 'POSNR'

property = if_wd_context_element=>e_property-read_only

value = 'X'.


The issue with this is that the code is working as expected except for the very first time when the view is loaded.

Any suggestions would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Rics

entry.title: Can recognize # as one of combination of CR?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We implemented Characteristic Relationship - Create method using Exit Class.

But a problem has occurred.

ADSO 1 (combination is here) has # as one of fields member.

Then, Query recognize that one as "All Combination of Master Data" (I think...)

If it worked, the result combination will be 150,

but because of the field (which has #, one of member), the result combination is 210,000...

 

some blog says the buffer logic on create method can fix this situation, but i don't know how to implement it...

entry.title: PR Generated For Obsolete Materials
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have scenario, where we have two materials and both have status of obsolete. These are externally procured material with Procurement type as 'F' and having the MRP type as 'PD' and lot size as Period lot size. We have maintained minimum lot size as 1620000 and rounding value as 1620000 for both materials. When we run MRP Live for the plant with planning mode as '3' 'delete and recreate' it creates the PR for one material with quantity 1620000 an for other its not creating any PR. I have checked master data for both materials and its exactly same, still why system is behaving like this. Can you provide details what other things I have to check.

Pls suggest the options other than ND MRP type.

@SAPSupport @Caetano

entry.title: Re: Object type PROG (SE38) not supported in SAP ABAP Cloud.
entry.content: Classes.

entry.title: Re: Help editing this query to allow for filtering by OIT...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please try this:

SELECT IG.ItmsGrpNam, IW.ItemCode, IM.ItemName, IW.WhsCode, ISNULL(IW.OnHand,0) AS 'OnHand', NULL AS 'Batch', NULL AS 'InDate'
FROM OITW IW
    INNER JOIN OITM IM ON IW.ItemCode = IM.ItemCode AND IM.InvntItem = 'Y' AND IM.ManBtchNum = 'N' AND IM.validFor = 'Y'
	INNER JOIN OITB IG ON IM.ItmsGrpCod = IG.ItmsGrpCod
WHERE IM.validFor = 'Y'
UNION ALL
SELECT IG.ItmsGrpNam,IW.ItemCode, IM.ItemName, IW.WhsCode, ISNULL(BQ.Quantity,0) AS 'OnHand', BN.DistNumber AS 'Batch', BN.InDate
FROM OITW IW
    INNER JOIN OITM IM ON IW.ItemCode = IM.ItemCode AND IM.InvntItem = 'Y' AND IM.ManBtchNum = 'Y'
    INNER JOIN OITB IG ON IM.ItmsGrpCod = IG.ItmsGrpCod
    LEFT OUTER JOIN OBTQ BQ ON IW.ItemCode = BQ.ItemCode AND BQ.WhsCode = IW.WhsCode
    LEFT OUTER JOIN OBTN BN ON BQ.MdAbsEntry = BN.AbsEntry
WHERE ISNULL(BQ.Quantity,0) <> 0
  AND IM.validFor = 'Y'

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Promises in ABAP - like in Javascript
entry.content: You can't find "promise" in ABAP, but you can find "asynchronous". Just search.

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to create variants for the job that releases changes from the Maint to Prod branc

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere – New Replication Flow
entry.content:
don't you miss Kafka as potential target as described in this blog ?
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-datasphere-replication-flows-blog-series-part-3-integration-with-kafka/ba-p/13580350

entry.title: Re: View Cluster Help
entry.content: If you don't give details, we can only generically answer: the message "enter a valid value" means that the ABAP validation for the field has failed, and you must find by yourself why it fails (because you didn't give any indication).

entry.title: Re: Data action is taking long to execute
entry.content:
@ahfadoo 

In Both Copy and Delete step, you should narrow down the scope to exactly the data you want to copy and delete by defining MEMBERSET for each dimension. Writing an open ended logic will force system to query too much records. Either use the graphical view to set the filters or script view and write MEMBERSET.

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Change value of fields of an internal table without loop
entry.content:
Do you think that a constructor expression has better performance?

That's a wrong assertion. The goal of constructor expressions is to clarify the ABAP code.

entry.title: Re: Conversion of XML to JSON using Generic Java Mapping
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have used your code and it works perfectly if there are more than 1 data however, if there is only 1 data passed, it does not produce a bracket []. Would you help me fix this? 

Sample: 

 

2 data - working - with bracket []

[
{
"parentImportKey": "ABC",
"responsibleOfficerImportKey": "ABC",
"description": "ABC",
"active": true,
"importKey": "ABC"
},
{
"parentImportKey": "DEF",
"responsibleOfficerImportKey": "DEF",
"description": "DEF",
"active": false,
"importKey": "DEF"
}
]

 

1 data - not working - without bracket []

{
"parentImportKey": "ABC",
"responsibleOfficerImportKey": "ABC",
"description": "ABC",
"active": true,
"importKey": "ABC"
}

entry.title: Change auto reply text sent from report AI_SDK_SP_AUTO_CLOSE in incident in ITSM
entry.content:
Change auto reply text sent from report  AI_SDK_SP_AUTO_CLOSE in incident in ITSM
We do not want to display the program name to the users.
Current text is as below:
************************************************************************
Message automatically processed by report "AI_SDK_SP_AUTO_CLOSE".
 
New user status:  &&'Closed'(E0008)&&
 
************************************************************************


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change auto reply text sent from report AI_SDK_SP_AUT...
entry.content:
that's the default standard text for report AI_SDK_SP_AUTO_CLOSE, if you need different texts, either customization or consulting service is needed.

Below documents for your reference:

KBA: ##1654653

https://community.sap.com/t5/additional-blogs-by-sap/solman-set-up-automatic-confirmation-changing-user-status-of-messages-using/ba-p/12914474

entry.title: Re: Installing Composable Storefront for SAP Commerce 2211.20
entry.content:
Hi PierreB,

I was trying to set-up the B2B Quotes using the composable storefront 2211.20. When I was trying to add the schematics using 'ng add@spartacus/quote' , I am getting the below error: 

✖ Unable to load package information from registry: 404 Not Found - GET https://<license_num>.npmsrv.base.repositories.cloud.sap/@spartacus%2fquote - Package '@spartacus/quote' not found.

Note:I have a valid license
Could you please help? 

Regards,

Dinesh A

entry.title: Freight Charges Missing in Purchase Order Output/XML (S/4 HANA Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Requirement: I Need to send freight charges (Condition Type FVA1) from the S/4 HANA cloud, public edition to a legacy system through EDI. 

Done up to: I am able to populate the required condition for freight charges (FVA1) in the purchase order document condition table by assigning the access sequence. 

Issue: When the output is triggered (channel EDI) the XML do not show the freight charges and only shows the net value. Expectation is to have a separate line for freight charges on the xml file.

Please suggest the solution.

 

Regards,

Gagan Saratkar

entry.title: Re: What is diffrence beween SAP HANA and SAP Native Hana...
entry.content:
SAP HANA is a high-performance, in-memory database system, used for real-time analytics and applications.

SAP Native HANA, refers to a development method where the application is built and runs directly on the HANA database to fully leverage its capabilities.

So, SAP HANA is the database, while SAP Native HANA is a development approach using this database.

entry.title: Can one shipment document create two shipment cost document?
entry.content: hi to all ! Can one shipment document create two shipment cost document? Because the shipment include shipment fee and loading fee.They are beyond two venders.

entry.title: SAP MII Custom table data (MDO) archiving
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

This is with respect to the archiving of custom data tables(MDO's) created in SAP MII.

Scenario - we have custom data table (MDO's) created to store the transactional data in SAP MII. now in production as the data is growing/increasing , users are facing the performance issues while using the SAP MII. also they are not able to perform there day to day activity with SAP MII.

Please note that underlaying database of SAP MII is HANA DB where all the custom tables are getting created.

Requirement - we wanted to check if there is any way in SAP MII or any SAP provided tool to archive the custom data table (MDO's) created to store the transactional data in SAP MII.

any help/ supporting guide/ relevance answer will be appreciated.

Regards,
Ankit Gupta

entry.title: Re: SAP IDM/SAC Support for SAC roles and TEAM liaison in...
entry.content:
Not a direct answer to your question, but have you looked at @Matthew_Shaw 's GitHub repository containing SAC SCIM API sample scripts? It looks like a pretty comprehensive resource for all questions user/teams/license management in SAC via REST. Check the links below:

  • https://github.com/SAP-samples/analytics-cloud-scim-api-samples/tree/main
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-analytics-cloud-user-and-team-provisioning-scim-api-sample-scripts/ba-p/13572651

entry.title: Apply caching for CAP Project for certain entity endpoint
entry.content:
Is there a way we can apply caching for certain endpoint in a CAP NodeJS Project?

For example, I have some entity that rarely change, so it kind of a waste if we keep calling it to the Database, I can apply some custom handler to handle OnRead to work with that, but it will be great if CAP have a way to define the caching for each entity.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Hub - successor ?
entry.content: Thanks : )

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Date Filter Issue in a Story Based on Live Co...
entry.content: Hi akhilgs,

entry.title: Re: ‘Without Quantity Posting’ oprion in A/R Invoices
entry.content:
Hi,

Select GST Debit Note as transaction type in A/R invoice and then you will get the option of without quantity posting. This is generally used for handling the rate difference cases.

Here you can do two things: - 

1. Use without quantity option and process.

2. Use service type document and charge the fees under appropriate GL and maintain the reference of original invoice under the tax tab which anyways is compulsory by SAP.

Hope this helps.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Date Filter Issue in a Story Based on Live Co...
entry.content:
Hi akhilgs,

when adding the Date (Range) filter I experienced the same problem when using the 'Date (Range)' parent note. However, when expanding the node and choosing the child 'Date (Range)' filtering works as expected. Does that work for you?

br
edgar

entry.title: Re: UDF Fields
entry.content:
Hi,

If you have turned off visibility through edit UI template then it does not get applied. You have to turn them off individually.

Else, you can try through users window and try using copy form settings option there if it works.

 

Regards

entry.title: [BUG] Weird behavior of question page
entry.content:
Hi,

This question page is behaving weirdly.

When clicking on the link from the SAP Business One tag page, it looks like this:

However, I have received two emails for replies made to this question:

  1.  

  2.  

Neither reply is shown on the question's page. The first one is an answer posted by OP. I seem to recall that I replied to that answer, and the second is OP's reply to my reply.

However, when I click on the link in the first email, the question page looks like this:

My reply and OP's reply to my reply, that should be found under OP's answer, are not there. Click on the 'Show entire topic' link, and OP's answer disappears:

Clik on the link in the second email, and the page is opened with OP's answer, but again without showing either my or his reply:

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: No response when clicking close button on fragement in custom action of UI5 Element
entry.content: Assign a controller to the fragement with the following code:sap.ui.define(["sap/fe/core/PageController"], function (PageController) { "use strict"; return PageController.extend("freightorderattachmgt.custom.fragment.fileselector", { onUploadSet: function () { console.log("Upload Button Clicked!!!") alert("upload set triggered"); /* TODO:Call to OData */ }, onCloseDialog: function () { console.log("Close clicked"); alert("upload set triggered"); this.pDialog.close(); this.byId("uploadDialogSet--uploadDialogSet").close(); }, onItemRemoved: function () { console.log("File Remove/delete Event Fired!!!") /* TODO: Clear the already read excel file data */ }, onUploadSetComplete: function () { console.log("File Uploaded!!!") /* TODO: Read excel file data*/ }, onBeforeUploadStart: function () { console.log("onBeforeUploadStart Event Fired!!!"); } }); }); Then a error shows

entry.title: Re: No response when clicking close button on fragement in custom action of UI5 Element
entry.content: The error is :Error found in Fragment (id: 'uploadDialogSet'). XML node: '<upload:UploadSet xmlns:upload="sap.m.upload" uploadEnabled="true" id="uploadSet" items="{path: '/', templateShareable: false}" fileTypes="png,pdf" maxFileNameLength="200" beforeUploadStarts="onBeforeUploadStart" uploadCompleted="onUploadSetComplete" afterItemRemoved="onItemRemoved" terminationEnabled="true"/>': TypeError: Cannot use 'in' operator to search for 'onBeforeUploadStart' in freightorderattachmgt.custom.fragment.fileselector -

entry.title: Re: Expose CDS View as OData Service/API in S/4HANA Publi...
entry.content: Thank you very much! It helped me solve my problem!

entry.title: Re: How to customise the error message - Could not open a...
entry.content:
This message comes from the ErrorHandler.js

If you are using a freestyle approach, you should be able to add a error callback in your ODataModel.read method. 
Look at this page for some more tips. sapui5 - Stick with generic ErrorHandler.js while allowing custom errormessage handling per request and not have double message boxes - Stack Overflow

entry.title: Re: DI API Deadlocks in SQL 2005 database server
entry.content: Hello, could you post your link again. Your link disable now. Thank you very much

entry.title: Re: SSAC COMPONENT- Service entry sheet accruals
entry.content: Hi, I have the same problem.. anyone can help us? Regards

entry.title: Re: Change value of fields of an internal table without loop
entry.content:
How about select directly from the SQL without performing a loop?

Below is an example to get NAME_TEXT by BNAME (SAP ID).

 

SELECT A~BNAME C~NAME_TEXT
  INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE GT_USR02
    FROM USR02 AS A
    INNER JOIN USR21 AS B
    ON A~BNAME = B~BNAME
    INNER JOIN ADRP AS C
    ON B~PERSNUMBER = C~PERSNUMBER.

entry.title: Dunning: put whole run as 1 pdf on network location
entry.content:
Hi,

we are using with an external postal service.

how can we set all dunning letters from 1 run on a shared network location in 1 pdf file?

do we have to define a pdf-printer, or is there some BTE to be used?

kr

Nico

entry.title: Re: Custom Business Object SAP HANA
entry.content: As I know, SLT can be used to replicate data from the underlying database table of the CBO to the SAP HANA database.

entry.title: Re: Can one shipment document create two shipment cost do...
entry.content:
Hi,

If you are talking about landed cost then, there is a functionality of multiple broker which you can activate from document settings - per document tab - landed cost.

After activating this feature, you can assign the vendor to each expense individually. But this feature is irreversible. Once enabled can not be be undone.

Regards

entry.title: Re: CPTA authorization request
entry.content:
The user profile does not have the necessary authorization to use transaction CPTA. This could be due to a number of reasons, such as your user profile not being assigned the necessary roles or the security settings of your SAP system.

If transaction CPTA is only used by FICO Month end users, it's possible that your user profile is not assigned to this user group. You may need to request this authorization from your system administrator or the person responsible for managing user profiles in your organization.

entry.title: Re: Error while deploying CDS based services on on premis...
entry.content:
The error message indicates that the `cds-serve` command cannot be executed due to permission issues.

Ensure that the `cds-serve` file has the correct permissions. You can use the `chmod` command to change the permissions. Also, the user must have to running the deployment process the necessary permissions to execute the `cds-serve` command. You may need to run the deployment process as a different user or modify the permissions of the current user.

entry.title: Re: Error while importing CO2e Emissions from SAP SFM into SAP SCT
entry.content:
Thanks for the Info.

 

It seems that we have an issue with the connection. We have wrong URLs and so on... We try to find the correct values to enter 🙂

 

Yes we did import it like your described process. 🙂

entry.title: Re: [BUG] Weird behavior of question page

Yesterday and today I had a doubt too, on a question, my yesterday comment disappeared, and today by adding the comment again, the existing answer had disappeared, and back again after refreshing (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/object-type-prog-se38-not-supported-in-sap-abap-cloud/qaq-p/13637790/comment-id/4821930#M4821930).

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation 2024 年 1 月新功能详解
entry.content:
本文为翻译文，原文链接What’s New with SAP Build Process Automation: January 2024，原文作者Jesse Sukhbayar。

SAP Build Process Automation 整合了工作流管理、RPA、决策管理、流程可视性和人工智能等功能，能够简化业务流程，提高效率。通过提高生产力、减少错误和加强团队协作，SAP Build Process Automation 能够加快决策速度，提高盈利能力。 

版本亮点：

  • 垂直流程编辑器和可用性改进
  • 在环境中部署项目
  • 新业务内容包
  • 使用增强的录制器记录活动
  • 立即运行 - 事件触发器
  • 从头开始构建 API 操作

1. 垂直流程编辑器和可用性改进

在2024年1 月，流程编辑器已通过新的和改进的垂直布局以及可用性增强进行了转换。这种改进的布局提供了更清晰的流程概览。它结合了强大的拖放功能，有助于在您的流程中无缝移动步骤。自动调整和保留的数据映射进一步有助于简化体验。升级后的编辑器不仅支持条件，还提供了一种更加动态和结构化的处理复杂工作流的方法。此外，由于简化了“转到步骤”逻辑并改进了连接的可视化，因此修改流程流变得更加直接。现在，您还可以通过我们的应用内帮助和引导式构建获得即时的上下文支持，并通过明确的说明和完善的选择工具增强您的整体建筑体验。

如果您想了解如何使用新功能，请参考如下教程：

  • 使用流程编辑器中的布局和可用性改进，构建您的第一个业务流程
  • 在垂直布局流程编辑器中使用布局的自动化、决策和流程可见性

2. 在环境中部署项目

在控制塔内，我们最近发布了名为“环境”的治理新功能。环境是可以部署和运行项目的虚拟空间。其中包括触发器和工作流定义等部件，以及生成自动化作业和工作流实例的代理等资源。在默认环境中，用户可以根据其安全级别访问部件。您将能够创建不同的共享环境，通过限制对项目的访问或启用不同配置中不同项目版本的部署来提高安全性。

了解更多信息：SAP Build Process Automation – 环境介绍 

相关文档：环境 | SAP Help Portal 

3. 新预置内容包

我们为 2023 年 12 月添加了 19 个新内容包，包括 12 个业务内容和 7 个学习内容选项。此外，我们还解决并修复了现有内容包中的问题，以实现更顺畅的用户体验。这些内容包专为不同的业务线（如 IT、销售、服务、寻源、财务和采购）精心设计。如需全面了解所有可用的预构建业务内容包，请查看 SAP Build @ SAP Accelerator Hub。

4.使用增强的录制器记录活动

您可以在 Agent 3 中使用增强的录制器录制 Web 和 Windows 应用程序，以提供增强的用户体验。在录制期间管理错误会变得更加高效和直观。浏览一系列选项，使您能够修改设置活动的输入值：

  • 将输入转换为变量：将输入值无缝转换为变量，从而提高录制过程的灵活性。
  • 将变量替换为原始输入：轻松将变量替换为原始输入值，确保所记录活动的精度。
  • 用现有变量替换输入：通过将输入值替换为预先存在的变量来简化工作流，从而优化录制会话中的效率。

增强的录制器中的这些选项可提升您对录制流程的控制，从而在管理活动时提供用户友好且动态的体验。

有关详细信息，请参阅增强录制器中的不同类型的设置活动选项。 

 5. 立即运行 - 事件触发器

 

现在，您可以通过模拟事件触发器有效负载来本地测试使用事件触发器的流程，而无需连接到系统或设置事件网格。这是为了测试端到端流程是否使用预期的有效负载格式正常运行。

触发器视图中事件触发器的“立即运行”操作允许执行事件触发器，以便立即使用用户提供的数据启动事件交付。有关详细信息，请参阅此处的文档。

6. 从头开始构建 API 操作

现在，您可以使用操作编辑器从头构建 API 操作。“从头构建”选项允许开发人员在不依赖现有模板或预定义结构的情况下创建 API 规范。

当需要一组唯一的 API 操作且必须根据项目需求或业务流程定制规范时，此选项非常有用。

如何使用此功能：

  1. 导航到连接器 > 操作。
  2. 选择“创建”并选择 API 源。
  3. 在 API 规范部分中，选择“从头构建”。
  4. 输入项目名称和描述。

点击“创建”。

成功创建后，您将被定向到操作编辑器，您可以根据需要在其中添加自定义操作。此直接流程可确保 API 规范与项目特定要求保持一致。立即浏览此新功能，并简化创建 API 操作的流程。

 感谢阅读！喜欢更新或获得反馈？请在评论中或通过 sbpa@sap.com与我们联系。本博客文章仅提供有关 SAP Build Process Automation 最新功能和增强功能的高级概览。您可以在“应用内新增功能”或“帮助门户新增功能查看器"中找到有关这些功能的更多详细信息。

entry.title: Re: Converting goal plan error
entry.content:
Hi Debbie_Moses ,

In latest goal Management Group goals are not yet supported, IN the latest Goal Management, group goals are replaced by team goals. You cannot perform any actions on group goals except for viewing group goals 

You can give a try by enabling team goals and then later try to convert the plan.

Mark this as answer if this helps.

Thanks

Mridul

entry.title: Re: Report on SAP Signavio Process Governance data using the Analytics API and Microsoft Power BI
entry.content:
Hi Manuel, 

In my case the records are getting restricted to 100. Is it something you are facing as well ? or do you suggest any workaround for it?

entry.title: Re: Object type PROG (SE38) not supported in SAP ABAP Cloud.
entry.content:
Hi Vincent801,

 

what are you trying to achieve? You want to implement a function module in ABAP Cloud? If yes I would refrain from that, function modules just like programs are from pre-ABAP OO time. We do not use them in current development as they are outdated. I would rewrite and implement the coding in a new method so instead of function zfm_operator, you create a method in your class called METHOD operator. If you want to call a remote function module you find a blog post here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/call-a-remote-function-module-rfc-from-sap-cloud-platform-abap-environment/ba-p/13458760

 

Best, Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: Change value of fields of an internal table without loop
entry.content: You say "I should do the same but without loop." It means you probably want to use what newbies call incorrectly "new ABAP", which is without "LOOP AT" (but in fact it remains a loop with only a different syntax), its real name is a Constructor Expression. Newbies incorrectly think that it has a better performance, that's completely wrong. I hope you understand now.

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow in SAP S/4HANA Sales Price
entry.content: Is it possible to add more pre conditions to the workflow?

entry.title: Re: Generating an Authorization Token in Romania’s ANAF Portal Using Postman
entry.content:
Hi @mahesh_varma 

the authorization token has a validity of only 90 days. It's very inconvenient to have to ask the accounting people (who have the ANAF certificate for authentication) to use Postman and get a new token every 3 months. 

Are there any updates on automatic renewal? I think the topic is quite urgent, since it's a missing block of the whole integration. 

Thank you

entry.title: Are there any use case for migrating HCM module from ERP 6.0 to SAP S/4HANA (on-premise)?
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently I'm just searching the realistic approach for now..

But I don't have any experience and knowledges about both module HCM and Migration.

 

The target system; SAP S/4HANA 2023 has already running and using for Accounting.

Another legacy system; ERP 6.0 EHP7 is still running including some modules... HCM is a part of them, so, they want to migrate to SAP S/4HANA. 
The point is including Japanese specific table can be included or not..
For example, Info type and cluster tables..

Or, do you have other idea to approach this case?

And also I appreciate you to share some successful points in this case..
Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Manual Bank statement issue.
entry.content:
Hi Aman,

 

the postings happen always in the defined account currency. You can define it and read more about it here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/651d8af3ea974ad1a4d74449122c620e/cb91d7531a4d414de10000000a174cb4.html

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: SAP Data Services Designer 4.2 and Windows Server 2019 compatibility
entry.content:
Hi 

Is SAP Data Services Designer 4.2 is compatible with Windows Server 2019?.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Services Designer 4.2 and Windows Server 201...
entry.content:
As per the product availability matrix, SAP Data Services Designer 4.2 SP14 and above are compatible with Windows Server 2019.

https://support.sap.com/content/dam/launchpad/en_us/pam/pam-essentials/TIP/PAM_DataServices_4_2.pdf

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: LTMOM : Add to Transport Request : Combination of obj...

Solution : setting for the Client : Automatic recording of changes needs to flagged

Tcode : SCC4

entry.title: Re: 单据实际打印内容被截断
entry.content: 請問使用PDF輸出會正常嗎?

entry.title: Re: Size tmpfs File System for Hana Fast Restart
entry.content: The tmpfs filesystem, stored in RAM, directly affects available RAM. Allocating 5TB to tmpfs reserves that RAM, making it unavailable for other processes. Your system has 2.6TB of free RAM, so allocating 5TB to tmpfs would overcommit your RAM, potentially causing errors and instability. This is likely why your OS team is reluctant to implement the requested tmpfs size. Consider reducing your tmpfs size to fit within your available RAM, increasing your RAM for larger tmpfs, or using a different method for faster Hana restarts that requires less RAM. Ensure your tmpfs size aligns with your free RAM to avoid issues.

entry.title: Re: Generating an Authorization Token in Romania’s ANAF Portal Using Postman
entry.content: Totally agree with @giulia-felappi ! I fully support this message

If i use loop i have problems for perfomance

entry.title: Re: Excel Upload By RAP Without Extending on SAP BTP/Busi...
entry.content:
Hi AR77,

Since update 2208 you can handle Large objects as Excel files in regular RAP applications without extensions.
I think this detailed guide will help you achieve your goal.

Kind regards, Serhii.

entry.title: Re: SQL query to calculate delivery dates for the Frame Agreements (Sale Blanket Agreement)
entry.content: hi Joihan, Hi Johan, If you see the query posted, the Delivery Date is calculated. Please find the attached screenshot. I wish to get correct Delivery dates based the Frequency - Monthly, Annual, Once, Weekly etc. In SAP, except Frquency "Occuring Once", for other like Monthly, Annual, the dates are not specified, Hence I need to get all delivery dates for specified frequencies for Frame Agreements.

entry.title: Re: SQL query to calculate delivery dates for the Frame Agreements (Sale Blanket Agreement)
entry.content: I also tried running another version with different logic. CASE WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'M' THEN COALESCE(OAT2."FromDate", OOAT."StartDate") WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'A' THEN COALESCE(OAT2."FromDate", OOAT."StartDate") WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'O' THEN COALESCE(OAT2."FromDate", OOAT."StartDate") WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'W' THEN COALESCE(OAT2."FromDate", OOAT."StartDate") WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'Q' THEN COALESCE(OAT2."FromDate", OOAT."StartDate") WHEN OAT2."DatePeriod" = 'S' THEN COALESCE(OAT2."FromDate", OOAT."StartDate") END AS "DeliveryDate"

entry.title: Re: Size tmpfs File System for Hana Fast Restart

entry.title: Re: Announcement: New release of content and central entry point for SAP BTP Solution Diagrams
entry.content:
@jrondorf Thanks for reaching out - we will update the template soon to use standard fonts only since it is too complicated to use them in publicly used templates. If you want to proceed you are welcome to use Microsoft Arial instead.

kind regards

Liza

entry.title: Recurring Schedule of Performance Forms for New hires
entry.content:
Hello Community, We are trying to set up a recurring auto-schedule of Performance Forms for new hires during the year. We were trying to use the Launch Forms option and there set-up a schedule however for us it doesn't give the expected result in terms of the Form End and Due Date.

For us the Form End and Due are Fixed (every year the 28th February) and not relative to the Hire date of the employee.

Did any of you face similar challenge? Or do you have any advise how to reach the same End Date/Due date for the launched forms?

Thank you in advance.
